description_long: This sconce features a gently undulating, wave-shaped metallic bar with four evenly spaced, downward-facing light fixtures attached along its length. Each fixture is suspended from the main bar by a short stem and is encased in a frosted or opaque glass shade, diffusing the light for a soft glow. The metallic bar appears to be made of brushed steel or aluminum, giving it a sleek, modern appearance. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no ornate detailing, emphasizing function and contemporary style. The mounting points are visible at intervals along the bar, suggesting secure attachment to a ceiling. The overall look is streamlined and suitable for modern urban interiors or commercial spaces.
description: A modern, wave-shaped metallic sconce with four frosted glass light fixtures suspended from a sleek bar. The design is minimalist and contemporary, ideal for ceiling mounting.
description_view_0: The sconce is seen from an angled perspective, highlighting the wave shape and the staggered arrangement of the four light fixtures.
description_view_1: A direct side view reveals the full undulating length of the metallic bar and the even spacing of the four downward-facing lights.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, showing the depth and curvature of the bar and the hanging fixtures.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view of view 1, again displaying the wave form and the symmetrical placement of the light fixtures.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with a wave-shaped metallic bar and simple frosted glass shades. Its clean lines and lack of ornamentation emphasize contemporary style.
